response.original_title: I Got The Blues In Me
response.overview: In this dark comedy-thriller, a cynical war veteran and his older companion, Rook, scavenge for survival while debating the dangers of sleeping in the open. Their fears of "psycho freaks" in the woods become terrifyingly real when a wealthy stranger, who earlier provided them with alcohol, returns in the dead of night blasting Vivaldi. Boasting of his Harvard pedigree and correcting their knowledge of Baroque music, the intruder reveals a sadistic, predatory nature, forcing the destitute pair into a desperate struggle against a man who views them as disposable prey.
response.title: I Got The Blues In Me
